notes: Actual cancellation plus NAV discount is strong R6 evidence, but SK Hynix-driven price acceleration requires 4B-watch.
Dunamu equity option is strong Stage 2, but Stage 3 waits for regulated revenue, equity-method income, and capital impact.
Insurance NAV value-up is useful, but a regulatory stake sale is not Green before capital release and shareholder return use are confirmed.
Internet-bank user growth cannot override major-shareholder legal and ownership regulatory risk.
Stablecoin policy excitement is Stage 1/4B-watch before licensing, fee, reserve income, and regulated revenue are visible.
Payment volume is not enough when privacy/data trust is broken; exact April 2025 sanction date needs source/date backfill.
Non-bank expansion can be good, but it is not Green before CET1, credit cost, integration cost, and shareholder return are clear.
